text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I can't believe summer camp's over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So many buono things happened, and I had so much fun. The watermelons, summer veggies, and somen noodles were super yummy too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But it's okay. I'm not sad or anything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Fall's going to be just as amazing! There'll be
roasted yams and mushrooms and grape picking!
And yummy rice and salted saury...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to next season as much as I looked forward to summer! Fall's going to be so great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to hear her thoughts on things
besides the foods she ate, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's stuff like that that makes Hishi Akebono who
she is. And with that, our sizzling summer camp
comes to an end.
